channel.title: SSscience
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSscience, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pesticide exposure linked to 150% higher cancer risk
item.description: Living in pesticide-heavy environments may raise cancer risk up to 150%.

item.title: Origin of human eyes traced to ancient 'cyclops' creature
item.description: Creature from 600 million years ago may hold key to eye and sleep cycle evolution.

item.title: DNA research rewrites origin of human species
item.description: New findings challenge idea of a single ancestral population in Africa.

item.title: Blood vessels in T. rex bones rewrite dinosaur science
item.description: Ancient blood vessels hidden inside fossilized bones offer new insights.
